nasb.text: Then let the young lady who pleases the king be queen in place of Vashti.” And the matter pleased the king, and he did accordingly.

esv.text: And let the young woman who pleases the king be queen instead of Vashti.” This pleased the king, and he did so.

cnv.text: 王喜悅的女子，就可以作王后，代替瓦實提。”王喜悅這話，就這樣行了。

ccb.text: 哪个女子讨王欢心，便立她为王后，代替瓦实提。”王觉得这个建议很好，就采纳了。
